case_title: YASMEEN AYMAN GHARIB VS. ANTONIA MICHELLE FISH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,854.00 FILED BY GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 05/09/2018 AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $44.81 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.00 SERVED FEB-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE $3,854.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,989.00, FOR AMJOUNTS DUE TO PLAINTIFF BASED ON THE DEBT SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT DATED FEB. 1, 2018 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF YASMEEN GHARIB IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTONIA FISH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHARIB, YASMEEN AYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT FISH, ANTONIA MICHELLE
